reviews.review_description: This game is amazing. It gets a little bit boring, but I like it. There’s a point system so you can continue to get better. / message for the developer. I think you guys should add customizable things like level one you get five coins every single level you get five coins and it goes up to like level 500 so you can play the game a lot and you can customize your sleigh, you can customize the reindeer. and once you get to level 100 you can customize your world or if that’s too much work I think just a level system would be cool and a shop for like customizing your sleigh ￼
